case_title: OPORTUN INC. (FORMERLY PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP.) VS. CLEBER DOS SANTOS FRANCA

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF DUE DILIGENCE IN ATTEMPTING SERVICE FEE FOR SERVICE: $65.00 FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. (FORMERLY PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP.) AS TO DEFENDANT FRANCA, CLEBER DOS SANTOS

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE AT THE REQUEST OF THE PLAINTIFF. PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. IS PRESENT. REPRESENTED BY DONNA FLORES ALBERTO, LEGAL COLLECTION SPECIALIST.
